name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or capability for Project Camp Backend

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Please open a Discussion before submitting a Feature Request.** Feature proposals that skip discussion are likely to be closed without action. Use GitHub Discussions to align on the problem and approach first.

---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or gap this feature addresses. Be specific. Focus on the problem, not the solution.
Example: "As a Project Admin, I have no way to bulk-assign tasks, which means I must update each task individually when onboarding new team members." -->

---

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you would like to see. Include:
- Which endpoint(s) would be added or modified (e.g. POST /api/v1/tasks/:projectId/bulk-assign)
- Expected request/response shape
- Role/RBAC requirements (Admin / Project Admin / Member)
- Any new Mongoose models or fields required -->

---

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- List any alternative approaches you considered and why they were ruled out. -->

---

## Use Cases

<!-- Describe concrete scenarios where this feature would be used. At least one is required. -->

1.
2.

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to relevant documentation, prior art, related issues, or design references. -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have opened or referenced a GitHub Discussion before submitting this request
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's RESTful, multi-tenant architecture
- [ ] I have considered the RBAC implications (which roles need access?)
- [ ] This request covers one discrete feature, not multiple unrelated capabilities
